message:
bd-3bxhj.6.2: Interaction trace capture and replay format

Canonical versioned trace format (interaction-trace-v1) with:
- TraceBuilder for event recording with labeled markers
- Structural validation (schema, monotonicity, contiguity, integrity)
- Replay planning with configurable speed factor
- Drift detection with threshold-based analysis
- 26 unit tests covering all validation and replay paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
